name: Skip Artist Vocals
description: Automatically skips songs by sexmane and seeks past vocal segments where sexmane is featured. Full-track skipping uses MediaSession metadata; segment skipping uses a SponsorBlock-style timestamp registry.
author: morphe-patches

settings.title: Skip sexmane vocals
settings.summaryOn: Songs by sexmane and songs featuring sexmane are automatically skipped
settings.summaryOff: Songs by sexmane are not skipped
